7 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
8 /* FemUtils.h (C) 2022-2025 */
9 /* */
10 /* Utilitary classes for FEM. */
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 #ifndef FEMTEST_FEMUTILS_H
13 #define FEMTEST_FEMUTILS_H
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
15 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
16 
17 #include <arcane/ArcaneTypes.h>
18 #include <arcane/utils/MDSpan.h>
19 #include <arcane/matvec/Matrix.h>
20 #include <arcane/VariableTypedef.h>
21 #include <arcane/Parallel.h>
22 #include <arcane/IIOMng.h>
23 #include <arcane/CaseTable.h>
24 
25 #include <arcane/utils/Real3.h>
26 #include <arcane/utils/Real3x3.h>
27 
28 #include <arccore/base/ArccoreGlobal.h>
29 #include <array>
30 #include <arcane/MeshVariableArrayRef.h>
31 
32 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 
35 struct Real4
36 {
37  Arcane::Real data[4];
38 
39  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Arcane::Real& operator[](std::size_t i) { return data[i]; }
40  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE const Arcane::Real& operator[](std::size_t i) const { return data[i]; }
41  // Vector addition: Real4 + Real4
42  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real4 operator+(const Real4& other) const
43  {
44  Real4 result;
45  for (std::size_t i = 0; i < 4; ++i)
46  result[i] = data[i] + other[i];
47  return result;
48  }
49 
50  // Vector subtraction: Real4 - Real4
51  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real4 operator-(const Real4& other) const
52  {
53  Real4 result;
54  for (std::size_t i = 0; i < 4; ++i)
55  result[i] = data[i] - other[i];
56  return result;
57  }
58  // Scalar multiplication: Real4 * scalar
59  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real4 operator*(Arcane::Real scalar) const
60  {
61  Real4 result;
62  for (std::size_t i = 0; i < 4; ++i)
63  result[i] = data[i] * scalar;
64  return result;
65  }
66  friend ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real4 operator*(Arcane::Real scalar, const Real4& vec)
67  {
68  return vec * scalar;
69  }
70 };
71 
72 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
73 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
74 
75 namespace Arcane::FemUtils
76 {
77 
79 struct CaseTableInfo
80 {
81  String file_name;
82  CaseTable* case_table = nullptr;
83 };
84 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
88 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
89 template <int N, int M>
90 class RealMatrix
91 {
92  using ThatClass = RealMatrix<N, M>;
93 
94  public:
95 
96  static constexpr Arcane::Int32 totalNbElement() { return N * M; }
97  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix() {};
98  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix(std::initializer_list<Real> init_list)
99  {
100  auto i = 0;
101  for (auto it = init_list.begin(); it != init_list.end(); it++) {
102  m_values[i] = *it;
103  i++;
104  }
105  };
106 
107  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix(std::initializer_list<std::initializer_list<Real>> init_list)
108  {
109  Arcane::Int32 i = 0;
110  for (const auto& row : init_list) {
111  Arcane::Int32 j = 0;
112  for (const auto& value : row) {
113  m_values[i * M + j] = value;
114  ++j;
115  }
116  ++i;
117  }
118  }
119 
121  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void fill(Arcane::Real value)
122  {
123  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N * M; ++i)
124  m_values[i] = value;
125  }
126 
127  public:
128 
129  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Arcane::Real& operator()(Arcane::Int32 i, Arcane::Int32 j)
130  {
131  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(i, N);
132  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(j, M);
133  return m_values[i * M + j];
134  }
135 
136  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Arcane::Real operator()(Arcane::Int32 i, Arcane::Int32 j) const
137  {
138  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(i, N);
139  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(j, M);
140  return m_values[i * M + j];
141  }
142 
143  public:
144 
146  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void multInPlace(Arcane::Real v)
147  {
148  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0, n = totalNbElement(); i < n; ++i)
149  m_values[i] *= v;
150  }
151 
153  void dump(std::ostream& o) const
154  {
155  const ThatClass& values = *this;
156  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
157  o << "[ ";
158  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
159  if (j != 0)
160  o << ' ';
161  o << values(i, j);
162  }
163  o << "]\n";
164  }
165  }
166 
168  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix<N, M> operator+(const RealMatrix<N, M>& other) const
169  {
170  RealMatrix<N, M> result;
171  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
172  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
173  result(i, j) = (*this)(i, j) + other(i, j);
174  }
175  }
176  return result;
177  }
178 
180  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix<N, M>& operator+=(const RealMatrix<N, M>& other)
181  {
182  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
183  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
184  (*this)(i, j) += other(i, j);
185  }
186  }
187  return *this;
188  }
189 
191  RealMatrix<N, M> operator-(const RealMatrix<N, M>& other) const
192  {
193  RealMatrix<N, M> result;
194  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
195  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
196  result(i, j) = (*this)(i, j) - other(i, j);
197  }
198  }
199  return result;
200  }
201 
203  RealMatrix<N, M> operator-() const
204  {
205  RealMatrix<N, M> result;
206  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
207  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
208  result(i, j) = -(*this)(i, j);
209  }
210  }
211  return result;
212  }
213 
215  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix<N, M> operator*(Real scalar) const
216  {
217  RealMatrix<N, M> result;
218  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
219  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
220  result(i, j) = (*this)(i, j) * scalar;
221  }
222  }
223  return result;
224  }
225 
227  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix<N, M> operator/(Real scalar) const
228  {
229  RealMatrix<N, M> result;
230  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
231  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
232  result(i, j) = (*this)(i, j) / scalar;
233  }
234  }
235  return result;
236  }
237 
239  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE friend RealMatrix<N, M> operator*(Real scalar, const RealMatrix<N, M>& matrix)
240  {
241  RealMatrix<N, M> result;
242  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
243  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
244  result(i, j) = scalar * matrix(i, j);
245  }
246  }
247  return result;
248  }
249 
250  private:
251 
252  std::array<Arcane::Real, totalNbElement()> m_values = {};
253 };
254 
255 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
256 // Outer product of two Real3 vectors to produce a RealMatrix<3, 3>
257 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
258 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline RealMatrix<3, 3> operator^(const Arcane::Real3& lhs, const Arcane::Real3& rhs)
259 {
260  RealMatrix<3, 3> result;
261  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
262  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < 3; ++j) {
263  result(i, j) = lhs[i] * rhs[j];
264  }
265  }
266  return result;
267 }
268 
269 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
270 // Outer product of two Real4 vectors to produce a RealMatrix<4, 4>
271 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
272 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline RealMatrix<4, 4> operator^(const Real4& lhs, const Real4& rhs)
273 {
274  RealMatrix<4, 4> result;
275  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
276  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
277  result(i, j) = lhs[i] * rhs[j];
278  }
279  }
280  return result;
281 }
282 
283 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
284 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
285 
286 template <int N, int M> inline RealMatrix<N, N>
287 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE matrixAddition(const RealMatrix<N, M>& a, const RealMatrix<M, N>& b)
288 {
289  using namespace Arcane;
290  RealMatrix<N, N> new_matrix;
291 
292  for (Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
293  for (Int32 j = 0; j < N; ++j) {
294  new_matrix(i, j) = a(i, j) + b(i, j);
295  }
296  }
297  return new_matrix;
298 }
299 
300 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
301 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
302 
303 template <int N, int M> inline RealMatrix<N, N>
304 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE matrixMultiplication(const RealMatrix<N, M>& a, const RealMatrix<M, N>& b)
305 {
306  using namespace Arcane;
307  RealMatrix<N, N> new_matrix;
308 
309  for (Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
310  for (Int32 j = 0; j < N; ++j) {
311  Real x = 0.0;
312  for (Int32 k = 0; k < M; ++k) {
313  x += a(i, k) * b(k, j);
314  }
315  new_matrix(i, j) += x;
316  }
317  }
318  return new_matrix;
319 }
320 
321 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
322 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
323 
324 template <int N, int M> inline RealMatrix<M, N>
325 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE matrixTranspose(const RealMatrix<N, M>& a)
326 {
327  using namespace Arcane;
328 
329  RealMatrix<M, N> t_matrix;
330  for (Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
331  for (Int32 j = 0; j < M; ++j) {
332  t_matrix(j, i) = a(i, j);
333  }
334  }
335  return t_matrix;
336 }
337 
338 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
339 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
340 
341 template <int N> inline RealMatrix<N, N>
342 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE massMatrix(const RealMatrix<1, N>& lhs, const RealMatrix<1, N>& rhs)
343 {
344  using namespace Arcane;
345 
346  RealMatrix<N, N> m_matrix;
347  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i)
348  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < N; ++j)
349  m_matrix(i, j) = lhs(0, i) * rhs(0, j);
350 
351  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i)
352  m_matrix(i, i) *= 2.;
353 
354  return m_matrix;
355 }
356 
357 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
361 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
362 template <int N>
363 class RealVector
364 {
365  using ThatClass = RealVector<N>;
366 
367  public:
368 
369  static constexpr Arcane::Int32 totalNbElement() { return N; }
370 
371  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealVector() = default;
372 
373  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealVector(std::initializer_list<Arcane::Real> init_list)
374  {
375  Arcane::Int32 i = 0;
376  for (auto it = init_list.begin(); it != init_list.end() && i < N; ++it, ++i) {
377  m_values[i] = *it;
378  }
379  }
380 
381  public:
382 
384  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Arcane::Real& operator()(Arcane::Int32 i)
385  {
386  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(i, N);
387  return m_values[i];
388  }
389 
391  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Arcane::Real operator()(Arcane::Int32 i) const
392  {
393  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(i, N);
394  return m_values[i];
395  }
396 
398  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Arcane::Real& operator[](Arcane::Int32 i)
399  {
400  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(i, N);
401  return m_values[i];
402  }
403 
405  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Arcane::Real operator[](Arcane::Int32 i) const
406  {
407  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(i, N);
408  return m_values[i];
409  }
410 
411  public:
412 
414  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void multInPlace(Arcane::Real v)
415  {
416  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0, n = totalNbElement(); i < n; ++i)
417  m_values[i] *= v;
418  }
419 
421  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void addInPlace(Arcane::Real v)
422  {
423  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0, n = totalNbElement(); i < n; ++i)
424  m_values[i] += v;
425  }
426 
428  void dump(std::ostream& o) const
429  {
430  const ThatClass& values = *this;
431  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
432  o << "[ ";
433  o << values(i);
434  o << "]\n";
435  }
436  }
437 
439  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealVector<N> operator+(const RealVector<N>& other) const
440  {
441  RealVector<N> result;
442  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
443  result(i) = (*this)(i) + other(i);
444  }
445  return result;
446  }
447 
449  RealVector<N> operator-(const RealVector<N>& other) const
450  {
451  RealVector<N> result;
452  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
453  result(i) = (*this)(i)-other(i);
454  }
455  return result;
456  }
457 
459  RealVector<N> operator-() const
460  {
461  RealVector<N> result;
462  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
463  result(i) = -(*this)(i);
464  }
465  return result;
466  }
467 
469  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void setEqualTo(const RealVector<N>& b)
470  {
471  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(totalNbElement(), N);
472  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0, n = totalNbElement(); i < n; ++i)
473  m_values[i] = b[i];
474  }
475 
477  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void add(const RealVector<N>& b)
478  {
479  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(totalNbElement(), N);
480  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0, n = totalNbElement(); i < n; ++i)
481  m_values[i] += b[i];
482  }
483 
485  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void sub(const RealVector<N>& b)
486  {
487  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(totalNbElement(), N);
488  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0, n = totalNbElement(); i < n; ++i)
489  m_values[i] -= b[i];
490  }
491 
493  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealVector<N> operator*(Real scalar) const
494  {
495  RealVector<N> result;
496  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
497  result(i) = (*this)(i)*scalar;
498  }
499  return result;
500  }
501 
503  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealVector<N> operator/(Real scalar) const
504  {
505  RealVector<N> result;
506  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
507  result(i) = (*this)(i) / scalar;
508  }
509  return result;
510  }
511 
513  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE friend RealVector<N> operator*(Real scalar, const RealVector<N>& vector)
514  {
515  RealVector<N> result;
516  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
517  result(i) = scalar * vector(i);
518  }
519  return result;
520  }
521 
523  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE friend Real dot(const RealVector<N>& u, const RealVector<N>& v)
524  {
525  Real result{0.};
526  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
527  result += u(i) * v(i);
528  }
529  return result;
530  }
531 
532  // private:
533  protected:
534 
535  std::array<Arcane::Real, totalNbElement()> m_values = {};
536 };
537 
538 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
539 // Matrix vector product of RealVector<N> vectors and matrix RealMatrix<N, N>
540 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
541 
542 template <int N> inline RealVector<N>
543 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE operator*(const RealVector<N>& lhs, const RealMatrix<N, N>& rhs)
544 {
545  RealVector<N> result;
546  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < N; ++j) {
547  result(j) = 0; // Initialize result element
548  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
549  result(j) += lhs(i) * rhs(i, j);
550  }
551  }
552  return result;
553 }
554 
555 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
556 // Outer product of two RealVector<N> vectors to produce a RealMatrix<N, N>
557 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
558 template <int N> inline RealMatrix<N, N>
559 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE operator^(const RealVector<N>& lhs, const RealVector<N>& rhs)
560 {
561  RealMatrix<N, N> result;
562  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
563  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < N; ++j) {
564  result(i, j) = lhs(i) * rhs(j);
565  }
566  }
567  return result;
568 }
569 
570 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
571 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
572 
573 template <int N> inline RealMatrix<N, N>
574 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE massMatrix(const RealVector<N>& lhs, const RealVector<N>& rhs)
575 {
576  using namespace Arcane;
577 
578  RealMatrix<N, N> m_matrix;
579  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i)
580  for (Arcane::Int32 j = 0; j < N; ++j)
581  m_matrix(i, j) = lhs(i) * rhs(j);
582 
583  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < N; ++i)
584  m_matrix(i, i) *= 2.;
585 
586  return m_matrix;
587 }
588 
589 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
590 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
594 extern "C++" bool
595 real3x3IsSym(const Arcane::Real3x3& mat);
596 
597 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
598 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
602 extern "C++" Real3
603 diagonalReal3x3(const Real3x3& mat);
604 
605 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
606 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
611 extern "C++" Real3x3
612 outdiagonalReal3x3(const Real3x3& mat);
613 
614 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
615 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
619 extern "C++" Real
620 real3x3Trace(const Real3x3& mat);
621 
622 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
623 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
628 extern "C++"
629 Real3 real3x3GetSupOutdiagonal(const Real3x3& mat);
630 
631 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
632 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
637 extern "C++"
638 Real3 real3x3GetLowOutdiagonal(const Real3x3& mat);
639 
640 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
641 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
642 
643 class Tensor2
644 {
645  RealVector<6> m_vec;
646 
647  public:
648 
649  static constexpr Int32 totalNbElement() { return 6; }
650 
651  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2() = default;
652 
653  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2(std::initializer_list<Real> init_list):m_vec(init_list)
654  {}
655 
656  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2(const Real3& a,const Real3& b) {
657  m_vec = {a.x, a.y, a.z, b.x, b.y, b.z};
658  }
659  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE explicit Tensor2(const RealVector<6>& vec) {
660  m_vec = {vec(0), vec(1), vec(2), vec(3), vec(4), vec(5)};
661  }
662 
663  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE explicit Tensor2(const Real3x3& mat) {
664  ARCANE_ASSERT(real3x3IsSym(mat), ("true"));
665  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 3; i++) m_vec(i) = mat[i][i];
666  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 3; i < 5; i++) m_vec(i) = mat[0][i - 2];
667  m_vec(5) = mat[1][2];
668  }
669 
670  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE ~Tensor2() = default;
671 
672  public:
673 
674  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real& operator()(Int32 i) {
675  return m_vec(i);
676  }
677 
678  [[nodiscard]] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealVector<6> getVec() const { return m_vec; }
679 
680  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real operator()(Int32 i) const {
681  return m_vec(i);
682  }
683 
684  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real& operator()(Int32 i, Int32 j)
685  {
686  int ij = get_index(i, j);
687  return m_vec(ij);
688  }
689 
690  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real operator()(Int32 i, Int32 j) const
691  {
692  int ij = get_index(i, j);
693  return m_vec(ij);
694  }
695 
697  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE explicit operator Real3x3() const {
698  Real3x3 mat;
699  for (Int32 i = 0; i < 3; i++) mat[i][i] = (*this)(i);
700  for (Int32 i = 3; i < 5; i++) {
701  mat[0][i - 2] = (*this)(i);
702  mat[i - 2][0] = (*this)(i);
703  }
704  mat[1][2] = mat[2][1] = (*this)(5);
705 
706  return mat;
707  }
708 
710  static Tensor2 identity() { return {Real3(1.,1.,1.), Real3::zero()}; }
712  static Tensor2 zero() { return {}; }
713 
714  public:
716  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void multInPlace(Real v) { m_vec.multInPlace(v); }
717 
719  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void addInPlace(Real v) { m_vec.addInPlace(v); }
720 
722  void dump(std::ostream& o) const { m_vec.dump(o); }
723 
725  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE bool operator==(const Tensor2& vec) {
726  Real eps{1.0e-15};
727  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i) {
728  if (fabs(m_vec(i) - vec(i)) > eps)
729  return false;
730  }
731  return true;
732  }
733 
735  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2& operator=(const Tensor2& vec) {
736  m_vec = {vec(0), vec(1), vec(2), vec(3), vec(4), vec(5)};
737  return (*this);
738  }
739 
741  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2& operator=(const Real3x3& mat) {
742  ARCANE_ASSERT(real3x3IsSym(mat), ("true"));
743  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 3; i++) m_vec(i) = mat[i][i];
744  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 3; i < 5; i++) m_vec(i) = mat[0][i - 2];
745  m_vec(5) = mat[1][2];
746  return (*this);
747  }
748 
750  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2 operator+(const Tensor2& other) const {
751  Tensor2 result;
752  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i) {
753  result(i) = m_vec(i) + other(i);
754  }
755  return result;
756  }
757 
759  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2& operator+=(const Tensor2& vec) {
760  *this = this->operator+(vec);
761  return (*this);
762  }
763 
765  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2 operator-(const Tensor2& other) const {
766  Tensor2 result;
767  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i) {
768  result(i) = m_vec(i)-other(i);
769  }
770  return result;
771  }
772 
774  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2& operator-=(const Tensor2& vec) {
775  *this = this->operator-(vec);
776  return (*this);
777  }
778 
780  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2 operator-() const {
781  Tensor2 result;
782  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i) {
783  result(i) = -m_vec(i);
784  }
785  return result;
786  }
787 
789  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void setEqualTo(const Tensor2& b) {
790  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i)
791  m_vec(i) = b(i);
792  }
793 
794  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void setVec(const Real3& d, const Real3& s) {
795  m_vec = {};
796  Arcane::Int32 i{0};
797  for (; i < 3; i++) m_vec(i) = d[i]; // xx yy zz
798  for (; i < 6; i++) m_vec(i) = s[i-3]; // xy xz yz
799  }
800 
802  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void add(const Tensor2& b) {
803  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i)
804  m_vec(i) += b(i);
805  }
807  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void add(const Real3x3& b) {
808  Tensor2 tb(b);
809  this->add(tb);
810  }
811 
813  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void add(const RealVector<6>& b) {
814  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i)
815  m_vec(i) += b(i);
816  }
817 
819  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void sub(const Tensor2& b) {
820  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i)
821  m_vec(i) -= b(i);
822  }
824  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void sub(const Real3x3& b) {
825  Tensor2 tb(b);
826  this->sub(tb);
827  }
828 
830  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void sub(const RealVector<6>& b) {
831  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i)
832  m_vec(i) -= b(i);
833  }
834 
836  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2 operator*(Real scalar) const {
837  Tensor2 result;
838  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i) {
839  result(i) = m_vec(i)*scalar;
840  }
841  return result;
842  }
843 
845  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2& operator*=(Real scalar) {
846  *this = this->operator*(scalar);
847  return (*this);
848  }
849 
851  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2 operator/(Real scalar) const {
852  Tensor2 result;
853  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i) {
854  result(i) = m_vec(i) / scalar;
855  }
856  return result;
857  }
858 
860  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Tensor2& operator/=(Real scalar) {
861  *this = this->operator/(scalar);
862  return (*this);
863  }
864 
865  static Arcane::Int32 get_index(Arcane::Int32 i, Arcane::Int32 j) {
866  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(i, 3);
867  ARCANE_CHECK_AT(j, 3);
868  if (j == i) return i;
869 
870  Arcane::Int32 ij{0}, nrow{3};
871 
872  if (j > i) ij = (i + 1) * (2 * nrow - i) / 2 + j - i - 1;
873  else ij = (j + 1) * (2 * nrow - j) / 2 + i - j - 1;
874  return ij;
875  }
876 
877  [[nodiscard]] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real3 get_diagonal() const { // xx yy zz
878  return {m_vec(0), m_vec(1), m_vec(2)};
879  }
880 
881  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void set_diagonal(const Real3& d) {
882  for (Int32 i = 0; i < 3; i++) m_vec(i) = d[i];
883  }
884 
885  [[nodiscard]] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real3 get_outdiagonal() const { // xy xz yz
886  return {m_vec(3), m_vec(4), m_vec(5)};
887  }
888  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void set_outdiagonal(const Real3& s) {
889  for (Int32 i = 3; i < 6; i++) m_vec(i) = s[i-3];
890  }
891 
892  [[nodiscard]] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real trace() const {
893  return m_vec(0) + m_vec(1) + m_vec(2);
894  }
895 
896  [[nodiscard]] ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE Real norm() const {
897  return sqrt(dot(m_vec,m_vec));
898  }
899 
901  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE void fromReal3x3ToTensor2(const Real3x3& mat) {
902  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 3; i++) (*this)(i) = mat[i][i];
903  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 3; i < 5; i++) (*this)(i) = mat[0][i - 2];
904  (*this)(5) = mat[1][2];
905  }
906 
907 
909  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE friend Tensor2 operator*(Real scalar, const Tensor2& vector) {
910  Tensor2 result;
911  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 6; ++i) {
912  result(i) = scalar * vector(i);
913  }
914  return result;
915  }
916 
918  ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE friend Real3x3 fromTensor2Real3x3(const Tensor2& vector) {
919  Real3x3 mat;
920  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 0; i < 3; i++) mat[i][i] = vector(i);
921  for (Arcane::Int32 i = 3; i < 5; i++) {
922  mat[0][i - 2] = vector(i);
923  mat[i - 2][0] = vector(i);
924  }
925  mat[1][2] = mat[2][1] = vector(5);
926 
927  return mat;
928  }
929 };
930 
931 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
932 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
936 extern "C++" void
937 _convertNumArrayToCSRMatrix(Arcane::MatVec::Matrix& out_matrix,
938  Arcane::MDSpan<const Arcane::Real, Arcane::MDDim2> in_matrix);
939 
940 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
941 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
955 extern "C++" void
956 checkNodeResultFile(ITraceMng* tm, const String& filename,
957  const VariableNodeReal& node_values, double epsilon,
958  double min_value = 0.0);
959 
975 extern "C++" void
976 checkNodeResultFile(ITraceMng* tm, const String& filename,
977  const VariableNodeReal2& node_values, double epsilon,
978  double min_value = 0.0);
979 
995 extern "C++" void
996 checkNodeResultFile(ITraceMng* tm, const String& filename,
997  const VariableNodeReal3& node_values, double epsilon,
998  double min_value = 0.0);
999 
1000 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1001 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1008 extern "C++" CaseTable*
1009 readFileAsCaseTable(IParallelMng* pm, const String& filename, const Int32& ndim);
1010 
1011 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1012 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1013 
1014 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils
